category_sources: source_facts.description says JPEG2000 Part-15/JPH/HTJ2K implementation; official GitHub README describes OpenJPH as an HTJ2K implementation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is openjph; official repository name and README use OpenJPH.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes table of contents, compiling, usage, and Doxygen documentation style; repository has a docs directory; project site is openjph.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/aous72/OpenJPH, so repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify JPEG2000 Part 15, JPH, and HTJ2K encoding/decoding.
